requirements.description: Daily stock prices, returns, volume, and shares outstanding for US equities from CRSP. Used to compute MAX, MAX(5), MAX(3m), MIN, daily returns for beta, IVOL, skewness, momentum, reversal, illiquidity, and market cap.
filters: Share code (shrcd) in [10,11] for common shares
Price filter: exclude stocks with prc < $5 (for robustness checks)
Size filter: exclude smallest two NYSE size deciles (for robustness checks)

requirements.description: Monthly stock returns and market capitalization for US equities from CRSP. Used for momentum (MOM), short-term reversal (REV), and monthly return calculations.
filters: Price filter: exclude stocks with prc < $5 (for robustness checks)
Size filter: exclude smallest two NYSE size deciles (for robustness checks)

requirements.description: Daily market index returns (value-weighted CRSP market index) and risk-free rate from CRSP / Kenneth French. Used for beta (Scholes-Williams), IVOL, systematic skewness, and idiosyncratic skewness.
Annual fundamental data from Compustat. Used for book-to-market ratio (BM) and book value of equity.
filters: Fiscal year ending in prior calendar year relative to portfolio formation month
Match to CRSP via CCM link table (permno-gvkey link)

requirements.description: Monthly factor returns from Kenneth French's Data Library. Used for four-factor alpha calculation (market, SMB, HML, UMD) and for Fama-MacBeth regressions.
NYSE market capitalization breakpoints for size decile classification. Used to identify and exclude microcaps (smallest two NYSE size deciles).
filters: Only NYSE stocks (exchcd=1) used to compute breakpoints
